name: retry_blocked_jobs
outcome_goal: Retry the 6 jobs that were blocked by governance gate

jobs.label: retry_p15_commitment_map
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis/Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/canvas/CommitmentMap.tsx.

Update CommitmentMap to accept config.workflowId and config.steps:
1. If config.workflowId set, fetch workflow template from /api/workflow-templates, convert steps to OperatingModel
2. If config.steps set (array of step names), generate a simple linear OperatingModel
3. Keep TEST_MODEL as fallback

Write the updated file.

jobs.label: retry_p17_doc_processor
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis.

1. Add POST /api/tools/document-process to surfaces/api/workflow_api.py (inline in do_POST). Accepts {content, steps}. Steps: parse, transform, validate, output. Process sequentially. Return {steps: [{name, status, result}], final_output}.

2. Update surfaces/app/src/modules/tool/DocumentProcessorModule.tsx: add textarea input, Process button, call API, show step statuses, write result to World.

Write both files.

jobs.label: retry_p18_data_pipeline
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis.

1. Add POST /api/tools/data-pipeline to surfaces/api/workflow_api.py. Accepts {source, transforms, output}. Source: objects or API endpoint. Transforms: filter, map, aggregate, sort. Return {result, row_count, columns}.

2. Update surfaces/app/src/modules/tool/DataPipelineModule.tsx: source selector, transform builder, Run Pipeline button, results display.

Write both files.

jobs.label: retry_p19_unified_search
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis.

1. Add GET /api/search to surfaces/api/workflow_api.py. Params: q, scope. Searches objects, manifests, receipts via FTS. Returns unified [{type, id, title, snippet, score}].

2. Update surfaces/app/src/modules/tool/SearchPanelModule.tsx: use /api/search, add scope tabs, click results to navigate.

Write both files.

jobs.label: retry_p21_object_browser
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis/Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Create src/modules/tool/ObjectTypeBrowserModule.tsx: id 'object-type-browser', defaultSpan '2x2'. Lists object types from /api/object-types. Click publishes to World. Create Type inline form with property definitions builder. Register in tool/index.ts.

Write the file.

jobs.label: retry_p22_schema_editor
jobs.prompt:

1. Add POST /api/object-types/update to surfaces/api/workflow_api.py. Partial update of type fields.

2. Create surfaces/app/src/modules/tool/SchemaEditorModule.tsx: id 'schema-editor', defaultSpan '2x2'. Subscribes to World selected_object_type. Shows editable property list. Save via POST. Register in tool/index.ts.

Write both files.
